title: Fig. 5 in Where there are moose (Alces alces) in Eurasia, there are moose nose botflies: First morphological and molecular identification of Cephenemyia ulrichii (Brauer, 1862) in Kazakhstan
author: Bauer, Christian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 5. Electrophoresis of PCR products of gDNA from Cephenemyia sp. larvae using the primer pair UEA5/UEA8. Lane L: gDNA marker; lanes 1–8: gDNA from individual larvae collected from moose #1 (1, 2), moose #2 (3–5) and moose #3 (6–8); lanes C+ and C-: positive (Cephenemyia sp. DNA) and negative (ddH2O) control, respectively.
steps_raw: Fig. 5. Electrophoresis of PCR products of gDNA from Cephenemyia sp. larvae using the primer pair UEA5/UEA8. Lane L: gDNA marker; lanes 1–8: gDNA from individual larvae collected from moose #1 (1, 2), moose #2 (3–5) and moose #3 (6–8); lanes C+ and C-: positive (Cephenemyia sp. DNA) and negative (ddH2O) control, respectively.
